languages.text: "Послушайте слова воина, а не дилетанта. Нужно уходить в оборону и выматывать врага. Ворота — наше главное преимущество".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
Не играет DL_MerovianKilled или DL_TraitorZarkov
Выдаем Obj2_Cl_Merovians

traits.locale_text: "Послушайте слова воина, а не дилетанта. Нужно уходить в оборону и выматывать врага. Ворота — наше главное преимущество".
traits.speaker: BranekZarkov

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
Не играет DL_MerovianKilled или DL_TraitorZarkov
Выдаем Obj2_Cl_Merovians

languages.text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."
languages.original_text: "Послушайте слова воина, а не дилетанта. Нужно уходить в оборону и выматывать врага. Ворота — наше главное преимущество".

traits.locale_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."
"Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."
"Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

languages.text: “听听真正上过战场的人怎么说，而不是那些半吊子。我们必须严防死守，拖垮敌人。城门就是我们的最大优势。”
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: “听听真正上过战场的人怎么说，而不是那些半吊子。我们必须严防死守，拖垮敌人。城门就是我们的最大优势。”

languages.text: « Faites confiance à un vrai combattant, plutôt qu'à une amatrice. Nous devons privilégier la défense et épuiser l'adversaire. Notre principal atout, ce sont les portes du palais. »
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: « Faites confiance à un vrai combattant, plutôt qu'à une amatrice. Nous devons privilégier la défense et épuiser l'adversaire. Notre principal atout, ce sont les portes du palais. »

languages.text: «Escuchen las palabras de un guerrero y no de advenedizos. Debemos adoptar una posición defensiva y agotar al enemigo. Nuestra principal ventaja son las puertas».
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: «Escuchen las palabras de un guerrero y no de advenedizos. Debemos adoptar una posición defensiva y agotar al enemigo. Nuestra principal ventaja son las puertas».

languages.text: "Bir amatörün değil, savaşçıların sözlerine kulak verin. Savunmaya geçmeli ve düşmanı tüketmeliyiz. Kapılar bizim ana avantajımız."
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Bir amatörün değil, savaşçıların sözlerine kulak verin. Savunmaya geçmeli ve düşmanı tüketmeliyiz. Kapılar bizim ana avantajımız."

languages.text: "Hört auf die Worte eines Kriegers, nicht auf die einer Dilettantin. Wir müssen uns verteidigen und den Feind auslaugen. Die Tore sind unser Hauptvorteil."
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Hört auf die Worte eines Kriegers, nicht auf die einer Dilettantin. Wir müssen uns verteidigen und den Feind auslaugen. Die Tore sind unser Hauptvorteil."

languages.text: 「武士の言葉に耳を傾けよ。アマチュアの言葉ではない。守りを固め、敵を疲れさせる。城門は我々の最大の強みである。」
languages.original_text: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."

traits.locale_text: 「武士の言葉に耳を傾けよ。アマチュアの言葉ではない。守りを固め、敵を疲れさせる。城門は我々の最大の強みである。」
